title: Faith in Jesus Christ
description: Faith in Jesus Christ is the first principle of the gospel and the foundation of the covenant path.

title: Repentance
description: Repentance allows us to change, receive forgiveness, and draw closer to Heavenly Father and Jesus Christ.

title: Baptism
description: Baptism by immersion is the first saving ordinance and marks the beginning of a covenant relationship with God.

title: Confirmation
description: Confirmation grants the gift of the Holy Ghost and full membership in the Church.

title: Aaronic Priesthood
description: The Aaronic Priesthood administers the ordinances of baptism and the sacrament and prepares young men for future service.

title: Melchizedek Priesthood
description: The Melchizedek Priesthood holds the authority to administer spiritual ordinances and lead the Church.

title: Temple Ordinances
description: Temple ordinances and covenants help individuals draw closer to Jesus Christ and prepare for eternal life.

title: Family History
description: Family history research connects generations and makes temple ordinances available for ancestors, helping unite families eternally.
